meaning: n.(绳,头发等的纽)结,(道路等的)弯曲,肌肉抽筋v.(使)纠结,(使)纽绞
examples: Be careful not to kink the hemp rope.
This kink is beginning to be obvious now!
Unfortunately, we ran into a bit of a kink doing this.
In any case, such a change would put a major kink in getting new drugs approved.
It duly arrived through Australian striker McDonald, who headed home a Tarmo Kink cross.
